summary: Backend: 18/18 pytest cases PASSED covering auth (signup/login/me/forgot-reset/change-password/google session invalid), users (search/get/update), friends (request/accept/list/block/unblock/relations), chats (open/list/messages/send-text/send-image/reply/edit/delete-me/delete-everyone/search), stories (create/feed/view/viewers/owner-only/delete), notifications (list/read), and WebSocket (typing broadcast, REST-message broadcast, invalid-token rejection). Frontend: Welcome→Signup→Feed flow works, Login flow works, Search returns matches, Tap user opens /user/{id}, Message button opens /chat/{cid}, sending text message renders bubble immediately. Bottom-tab navigation between Feed/Find/Bonds/You all functional. Detected two React Native Web style deprecations (shadow*, pointerEvents) as console warnings — non-blocking but should be migrated. One real UX bug: signup validation error is rendered as literal string '[object Object]' when backend returns 422 (see /app/frontend/app/(auth)/signup.tsx error handling). One design issue on Welcome: hero tagline has very poor contrast against dark hero image and is nearly unreadable.

ui_bugs.issue: When backend returns 422 (validation error) the error box renders literal '[object Object]' instead of a readable message. Reproduce: submit signup with an invalid email format. File: /app/frontend/app/(auth)/signup.tsx

issues: Hero tagline 'Where quiet conversations become close bonds.' has very low contrast against the dark background image – text is nearly unreadable. Consider a semi-opaque overlay or lighter text color.

react_native_issues.issue: React Native Web deprecation warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' — audit StyleSheet usages of shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius and replace with boxShadow (or use Platform.select for RN native + web).
React Native Web deprecation warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents' — replace `pointerEvents="..."` prop on Views with `style={{ pointerEvents: '...' }}`.

action_items: Fix signup/login error rendering to stringify the API error object (extract err?.response?.data?.detail || err?.message) instead of embedding the raw object which becomes '[object Object]'.
Improve Welcome hero text contrast (add overlay gradient or switch tagline color to a lighter tone).
Migrate shadow* style props to boxShadow and pointerEvents prop → style.pointerEvents for RN Web compatibility.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is a single 900+ line module — consider splitting into routers (auth, users, friends, chats, stories, ws) for maintainability.
google_session endpoint currently returns 500 for network/parse errors rather than 401; acceptable but the test tolerates 400/401/500.
friend_request auto-accepts the reverse pending request but then also does not notify the requester of acceptance until the second user calls accept explicitly — verified working via nested call.
WS endpoint only handles 'typing'/'ping' from client — no client-originated message send, which is fine given REST /chats/message rebroadcasts.

success_rate.frontend: ~90% – core flows verified; one HIGH UX bug in signup error display

seed_data_creation: Test users created dynamically per run with prefix TEST_/uia_/uib_ + uuid, and a friendship pair for chat testing. All test data uses random suffixes so re-runs are idempotent.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://nexus-social-hub.preview.emergentagent.com  (frontend .env key is EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL not EXPO_BACKEND_URL). Full pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_nexus_api.py runs in ~14s and covers all MVP endpoints + WS. Key frontend testIDs: welcome-email-signup, welcome-email-login, signup-{name,username,email,password}-input, signup-submit-button, login-{email,password}-input, login-submit-button, tab-{feed,search,nexus,friends,profile}, search-input, search-result-{username}, user-{back,message,unfriend,block}, chat-{back,search-toggle,attach-image,input,send}, profile-{edit,settings,notifications,friends,blocked,logout,theme-toggle}.
rca_of_issue: Signup error '[object Object]' RCA: Frontend catches the axios/fetch error and renders `error.response.data` (which is a Pydantic 422 body { detail: [ {loc,msg,type}, ... ] }) directly inside a Text component. React renders objects/arrays through String() → '[object Object]'. Fix: extract a string message, e.g. `const msg = err?.response?.data?.detail; setError(typeof msg === 'string' ? msg : Array.isArray(msg) ? msg.map(d=>d.msg).join(', ') : (err?.message || 'Signup failed'));`
